title: cyclosorus lanosus
intro: Cyclosorus lanosus, also known as the fuzzy fern or hairy fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyclosorus lanosus include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
